values.0: outside training-signal coverage; mask placer score
values.1: inside training-signal coverage; placer score is meaningful

definition: Cells where the calibrated fused placer probability exceeds 0.01. The v3.6 raster's empirical floor is ~0.0004 (per goldbug 2026-06-08); cells at the floor are regions where the model has no learned signal and goldbug should not show a placer score.
